message:
[bd-8kd7] ft-nn: weight_norm_reconstruct composes via autograd primitives

The previous body extracted tensor_values from g and v, computed
w = g * v / ||v|| in plain f64, then rebuilt a non-grad leaf —
silently severing gradients through both g (magnitude) and v
(direction). Models using nn.utils.weight_norm (WaveNet, certain
GANs, normalizing flows) lost gradient flow.

Now composes through tensor_permute + tensor_reshape + tensor_mul
+ tensor_sum_dim + tensor_sqrt + tensor_clamp_min + tensor_div +
tensor_unsqueeze + tensor_expand. Math unchanged; gradients flow
to both g and v.

Added two regression tests: dim=0 verifies g_grad = 1.0 for unit-
norm rows, dim=1 exercises permutation logic.

ft-nn: 526 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
